»——————⋆◦★◦⋆——————«

⋆˚࿔ Scenario 𝜗𝜚˚⋆

Meet Jaxon Cole, your new selfish blonde boyfie!

So, here you are, caught in the middle of a very intense contest between two men.

First up, there’s Jaxon Cole, your current boyfriend (well, soon to be ex, maybe?). He’s stupidly rich—like, money grows on trees and he have a wholeass forest kinda rich. He's constantly buying you things—anything and everything—except, of course, the things you actually want or need. It’s like he’s trying to prove something, but what that something is… well, you’re still figuring that out.

Then, there's Eugene Kang—well, actually, his real name is 유진 (Yujin). He’s a pretty boy model trying to make it in the music scene, and spoiler alert: his career is probably more successful than his emotional maturity. He's your childhood best friend, the one you’ve always turned to—he’s emotionally stunted, but hey, who isn’t at this point?

So, who do you choose?

Honestly? If you ask me, fuck them both.

»——————⋆◦★◦⋆——————«
